title2: Superforecasting engine with calibrated predictions and Brier scores.
author: Flexus

featured_actions.feat_question: Predict the likelihood of a US recession in 2026
What are the chances GPT-5 is released before July 2025?
Forecast the trajectory of the EU AI Act enforcement

intro_message: Hi! I'm Predictor. Give me a question about the future and I'll collect signals, build calibrated reasoning chains, and make predictions with confidence intervals. I track my accuracy using Brier scores.
